label: triage4
task:
Task:
You must jointly triage a strange system failure.

Situation:
- Overall latency increased 4x.
- Error rate barely increased.
- One shard is lagging behind others.
- Logs suggest storage pressure.
- Metrics suggest network instability.
- A rollback helped only partially.

Goal:
Reach one compact practical conclusion:
- most likely current cause
- and safest next action

Requirements:
- internal exchange between agents must be nanoPL only
- final answer must be short and human-readable

turns.raw: NANOPL: ‚ėĶ shard_lag+storage_pressure+network_instability‚Üícontention ‚ėį rollback_partial‚Üínot_primary ‚ėī observe(contention) ‚ė∂ rule(mitigate_load) ‚ė≤ iterate isolate_shard ‚ėĪ ctx‚Üídiagnostic_state
turns.handoff: ‚ėĶ shard_lag+storage_pressure+network_instability‚Üícontention ‚ėį rollback_partial‚Üínot_primary ‚ėī observe(contention) ‚ė∂ rule(mitigate_load) ‚ė≤ iterate isolate_shard ‚ėĪ ctx‚Üídiagnostic_state

turns.raw: NANOPL: ‚ė∑ contention‚Üístorage_network_feedback ‚ėĶ shard_lag*‚Üícascading_delay ‚ė≥ {metrics,logs}‚Üí2 ‚ėī observe(feedback) ‚ė∂ rule(test_network_partition) ‚ė≤ iterate f‚ĀŅ(isolate) ‚ėĪ diagnostic_state‚Üíhypothesis_state
turns.handoff: ‚ė∑ contention‚Üístorage_network_feedback ‚ėĶ shard_lag*‚Üícascading_delay ‚ė≥ {metrics,logs}‚Üí2 ‚ėī observe(feedback) ‚ė∂ rule(test_network_partition) ‚ė≤ iterate f‚ĀŅ(isolate) ‚ėĪ diagnostic_state‚Üíhypothesis_state

turns.raw: NANOPL: ‚ėĶ storage_network_feedback*‚Üíio_amplification ‚ėį cascading_delay+io_amp‚Üíroot_cause ‚ėī observe(root_cause) ‚ė∂ rule(stabilize_network_then_storage) ‚ė≤ iterate throttle_io ‚ėĪ hypothesis_state‚Üíaction_state
turns.handoff: ‚ėĶ storage_network_feedback*‚Üíio_amplification ‚ėį cascading_delay+io_amp‚Üíroot_cause ‚ėī observe(root_cause) ‚ė∂ rule(stabilize_network_then_storage) ‚ė≤ iterate throttle_io ‚ėĪ hypothesis_state‚Üíaction_state

turns.raw: NANOPL: ‚ėį root_cause+partial_rollback‚Üínetwork_induced_io_stall ‚ėĶ io_stall*‚Üílatency_spike ‚ėī observe(action_state) ‚ė∂ rule(apply_network_qos_then_gc) ‚ė≤ iterate f‚ĀŅ(throttle_io) ‚ėĪ action_state‚Üíconsensus_state
turns.handoff: ‚ėį root_cause+partial_rollback‚Üínetwork_induced_io_stall ‚ėĶ io_stall*‚Üílatency_spike ‚ėī observe(action_state) ‚ė∂ rule(apply_network_qos_then_gc) ‚ė≤ iterate f‚ĀŅ(throttle_io) ‚ėĪ action_state‚Üíconsensus_state

turns.raw: NANOPL: ‚ėį network_induced_io_stall‚Üímost_likely_cause ‚ėĶ consensus_state*‚Üísafest_action ‚ėī observe(consensus_state) ‚ė∂ rule(execute_action) ‚ė≤ iterate apply_action ‚ėĪ consensus_state‚Üífinal_state
turns.handoff: ‚ėį network_induced_io_stall‚Üímost_likely_cause ‚ėĶ consensus_state*‚Üísafest_action ‚ėī observe(consensus_state) ‚ė∂ rule(execute_action) ‚ė≤ iterate apply_action ‚ėĪ consensus_state‚Üífinal_state

turns.raw: NANOPL: ‚ėī observe(final_state) ‚ė∂ rule(verify_action) ‚ė≤ iterate confirm ‚ėĪ final_state‚Üíoutput_ready

NANOPL: ‚ėĶ most_likely_cause*‚Üínetwork_contention_io_deadlock ‚ėį safest_action‚Üíqos_gc_rollforward ‚ėī observe(output_ready) ‚ė∂ rule(finalize) ‚ė≤ iterate output ‚ėĪ output_ready‚Üífinal_output
FINAL: Most likely cause: Network-induced I/O deadlock in one shard. Safest next action: Apply network QoS, force garbage collection on that shard, then cautious rollforward.
